title: [Stream Summary] 2026 Roadmap Part 1 Stream
mechanisms_applied: Stream announcement of major 2026 updates creates positive sentiment. Tier 3 gold cost removal and honing simplification signal gold sink reduction. Activity overhaul removes Weekly Unas and simplifies progression, reducing material demand volatility.

title: [Roadmap Item] Dragonknight Class Release & Balance Patch
mechanisms_applied: New class launch drives demand for honing materials and gems. South Rimeria Powerpass release increases material consumption. Merged balance patches from Korea create class-specific demand spikes. New players and alts require engraving books.

title: [Roadmap Item] Tier 3 Progression Overhaul
mechanisms_applied: Removal of gold costs from Tier 3 honing eliminates major gold sink. Removal of gear honing for lower T3 (Brelshaza gear) reduces material demand significantly. Bulk honing QoL feature increases efficiency, reducing total materials needed. Smart-facet feature for ability stones reduces stone consumption.

title: [Roadmap Item] Activity Overhaul & Content Removal
mechanisms_applied: Removal of Book of Coordination, Proving Grounds, Inferno raids, and Tower content eliminates multiple material sources. Weekly Unas removal reduces daily/weekly material generation. Guardian Stones and Destruction Stones become character-bound (reduced tradeable supply). Fate Ember materials become tradeable (increased supply fluidity). Field boss rewards restructured with increased stone drops but character-bound status.

title: [Roadmap Item] Paradise Season 3 & Ends of the Abyss Story
mechanisms_applied: Story conclusion (Kazeros storyline Part 1 finale) drives engagement and content consumption. Guardian Raids and Kazeros Raid Act 4 balance changes adjust difficulty and reward structures. New progression event for endgame preparation increases material demand. Narrative conclusion creates temporary content engagement spike.

title: [Roadmap Item] Serka Shadow Raid Launch
mechanisms_applied: New Tier 4 gear progression system creates sustained material demand. Acceleration system using crafting materials increases resource consumption. Honing up to +20 (or +25 accelerated) extends progression timeline. New raid mechanics (Brawl system, Shadow Skills, Brave Hearts revive system) require player preparation and gear investment. High difficulty (9/10) drives demand for gems, engravings, and cards for optimization.

title: [Stream Summary] 2026 Roadmap Part 1 Stream
mechanisms_applied: Stream announcement of major 2026 roadmap including Tier 3 progression changes, activity overhaul, and content removal. Positive sentiment on upcoming Dragonknight class and Paradise Season 3. Honing material supply increases due to removal of gold costs and new bulk honing features. Demand remains stable as players prepare for new content.

title: [Roadmap Item] Ends of the Abyss - Kazeros Story Conclusion
mechanisms_applied: Story conclusion with cinematic sequences and narrative developments. Introduces new Abyss Dungeon (Horizon Cathedral) with 2 gates. Demand for honing materials increases as players progress through story content. New currency (은총의 파편) introduced for gear progression. Gold sinks through new raid rewards and exchange shop mechanics.

title: [Roadmap Item] Paradise Season 3 Launch
mechanisms_applied: New Tier 4 gear progression system with reduced farming time. Acceleration system introduced using same materials as crafting. Serka Shadow Raid provides Ark Grid Cores. Increased supply of honing materials due to reduced crafting time. New Brawl system and Shadow Skills mechanics increase engagement and material demand.

title: [Roadmap Item] Horizon Cathedral Abyss Dungeon Release
mechanisms_applied: 2-gate Abyss Dungeon with 3 difficulty tiers (1700/1720/1750 item level). Comfort difficulty design with unlimited revives. High gold sink through bound gold rewards (100% bound). Demand for gems and engravings increases due to new raid mechanics. No first-week clear rewards or honor rewards, reducing inflation pressure.

title: [Roadmap Item] Tier 3 Progression System Overhaul
mechanisms_applied: Major supply increase: removal of gold costs from Tier 3 honing, removal of gear honing for lower T3 (Brelshaza Gear), bulk honing feature, smart-facet ability stone feature. Significant gold inflation as players no longer spend gold on honing. Demand for honing materials decreases due to reduced progression requirements. Quality of life improvements reduce material consumption.

title: [Roadmap Item] Activity Overhaul and Content Removal
mechanisms_applied: Removal of Book of Coordination, Proving Grounds, Inferno raids, early Trial Guardian Raids, Tower content, and Weekly Unas. Guardian Stones and Destruction Stones become character-bound (increased quantity). Honing materials from Fate Embers become tradeable. Field boss rewards restructured with increased materials for Sevek Atun. Supply of tradeable materials increases while character-bound materials become more abundant.

title: [Roadmap Item] Dragonknight Class Release with South Rimeria Powerpass
mechanisms_applied: New class release with powerpass drives high demand for honing materials and gems as players gear new characters. Balance patch implementation increases engagement. Progression events accompanying release create gold sinks. Package volume increases due to class popularity and cosmetic demand.

title: [Roadmap Item] Serka Shadow Raid - April Release
mechanisms_applied: First Shadow Raid introduces Ark Grid Cores and Tier 4 gear progression. New Brawl system and Shadow Skills mechanics increase combat complexity. Brave Hearts revive system (shared party revives) creates strategic demand. High difficulty content drives demand for gems, engravings, and optimization materials. Gold sinks through raid rewards.
